description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, rectangular footprint and a spacious surrounding yard. The structure features a prominent, low-pitched hip roof with a central raised section, and a small gable accent above the main entrance. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, with large rectangular windows distributed across all visible sides, providing ample natural light. A covered porch with supporting columns is present at the front, offering a sheltered entryway. The building sits on a slightly elevated platform, and the roof includes a visible staircase leading to the upper section, suggesting possible rooftop access.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, central raised section, front porch, and large rectangular windows, set on a broad lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back entrance, a small gable above the door, and fewer windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the staircase to the roof, two large windows, and the extended yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window on the upper section and a symmetrical lower facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side windows
